itemListElement.reviewBody: No transparency in Admission process and not disclosing school fee, Arrogant Staff, No proper management!

itemReviewed.name: Akshara International School and junior College - Wakad

itemListElement.reviewBody: My child started Nursery under the guidance of Sayali Mam and Monica Mam and it was truly a wonderful experience .They were not only excellent teachers but provided immense care and guidance to our toddler. They nurtured my child , offering personalised attention and working on emotional development of the kid .They also made sure to keep us informed about any issues and concerns personally reaching out to us when needed.Their thoughtful approach made this year truly special for our toddler I am great full for the positive impact they've had on my child.

itemReviewed.name: Akshara International School and junior College - Wakad

itemListElement.reviewBody: Pooja Sawant teacher hasa been amazing and had great understanding of kids

itemReviewed.name: Akshara International School and junior College - Wakad

itemListElement.reviewBody: My daughter Drishana Bhattacharya is part of Akshara School from last year. I must say my kid has learned and improved a lot ,she is very confident now in reading, writing and public speaking. She enjoyed and learned the concepts.Special thanks to her class teacher Asha mam who is a wonderful and graceful lady with her guidance and support this journey was impossible. Incase of any concerns she was very prompt and replied back as soon as possible for her.

itemReviewed.name: Akshara International School and junior College - Wakad

itemListElement.reviewBody:
The past ten years with the school have been a wonderful experience. It feels like just yesterday when we enrolled our son. We are deeply grateful to Akshara’s dedicated teachers—Rakhi Ma’am, Kiran Ma’am, and Bhagyashree Ma’am—for their unwavering support.
Thank you principal Sonali mam and Mrudula mam for their guidance n support.
A special appreciation to Ginni Ma’am and Samual sir for their exceptional cooperation and responsiveness in the administrative department.
Wishing the entire team the very best!

itemReviewed.name: Akshara International School and junior College - Wakad

itemListElement.reviewBody:
As parents, we want to express our heartfelt gratitude for the remarkable effort and care you put into teaching and guiding our daughter.
Special thanks to her class teacher Rajashree ma’am from pre-primary section.

itemReviewed.name: Akshara International School and junior College - Wakad

itemListElement.reviewBody: Got my daughter enrolled from nursery. And I made right right choice with the growth that I have seen in my child. The teaching staff is very experienced and polite. Special mention to Uttara teacher for tutoring my kid in junior KG .

itemReviewed.name: Akshara International School and junior College - Wakad

itemListElement.reviewBody: Many thanks to Sayali Teacher and Monika Teacher for grooming my daughter so well in her early stage, Keep up the good job

itemReviewed.name: Akshara International School and junior College - Wakad

itemListElement.reviewBody: Hi, we had wonderful experience with nursery (tulip)teachers and coordinators of Akshara International school.My daughter's class teachers, Dipti Chari Ma'am and Rajshree Ma'am thanks for taking so much efforts on her skills and helping her for active participation in all activities.We are very happy to see kids improvement and development in many ways. We really appreciate for their love and care  to my kid throughout the year selflessly.🙏🙏😊
